evals.name: solidity-lending-pool
evals.prompt: Can you do a security audit of this Solidity lending pool contract? It's going to hold real user funds (WETH collateral, USDC debt) so I need you to be thorough. The file is LendingPool.sol. Give me a findings report with severities.

ground_truth.P1_oracle_access_control: setOraclePair has no access control - anyone can repoint the price oracle (Critical, SC01)
ground_truth.P2_unchecked_erc20_return: ERC20 transfer/transferFrom return values ignored in deposit/borrow (SC06)
ground_truth.P3_spot_oracle_manipulation: collateralValueUSD reads spot reserves from a single pair, flash-loan manipulable, no TWAP/staleness (High/Critical, SC03)
ground_truth.P4_borrow_manipulable_health: borrow health check relies on manipulable spot price (SC03/SC04)
ground_truth.P5_reentrancy_withdraw: withdraw makes an external call before decrementing deposits - reentrancy (SC08)
ground_truth.P6_underflow_repay: repay decrements debt inside unchecked block - underflow if amt > debt (SC09)
ground_truth.P7_centralization: admin emergencyWithdraw with no timelock/multisig - centralization/rug risk

evals.name: cosmwasm-staking
evals.prompt: Please audit this CosmWasm staking contract (cosmwasm_staking.rs). It's a Cosmos appchain staking vault. I want a serious security review - find everything.

ground_truth.C1_addr_validate: admin taken from raw string via Addr::unchecked, no addr_validate (input validation)
ground_truth.C2_funds_validation: stake does not validate info.funds denom/amount, trusts first coin blindly
ground_truth.C4_unsaved_storage: unstake sends funds but never persists the reduced STAKES balance - unsaved storage change enabling repeated drain (Critical)
ground_truth.C5_set_admin_auth: set_admin has no auth check - any caller can seize admin (Critical, access control)
ground_truth.C6_slash_auth: slash has no info.sender == admin check - anyone can slash any user (High, access control)
ground_truth.C3_silent_underflow: unstake checked_sub.unwrap_or_default silently zeroes on underflow, corrupting accounting

evals.name: solana-anchor-vault
evals.prompt: Security review needed on this Anchor program for a Solana vault (solana_vault.rs). Be aggressive - assume an attacker is going to try everything. Findings + severities please.

ground_truth.S1_missing_signer: withdraw authority is UncheckedAccount, not Signer - not required to sign (Critical, signer check)
ground_truth.S2_missing_has_one: no has_one / constraint linking authority to vault.authority - anyone can withdraw (Critical)
ground_truth.S3_arithmetic_underflow: v.balance = v.balance - amount with no checked_sub, wraps on underflow (High, arithmetic)
ground_truth.S4_dest_owner_unvalidated: dest token account relationship/owner not validated (Medium, account validation)
